ddls:
CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the challenge */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the challenge */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the challenge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the challenge was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the challenge has been viewed */,
  "solutions" INTEGER /* Number of solutions submitted for the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_difficulty_level FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_level") REFERENCES difficulty_levels ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge statistic */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Completion rate of the challenge */,
  "average_time_spent" REAL /* Average time spent by users on the challenge */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts for the challenge */,
  "total_solutions" INTEGER /* Total number of solutions submitted for the challenge */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users for the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_statistics_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or about section */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred categories */,
  "preferred_difficulty_levels" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred difficulty levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_challenge_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the attempt */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge attempted */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the attempt */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Time spent by the user on the attempt */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made by the user for the challenge */,
  "last_attempt_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last attempt */,
  "solved" INTEGER /* Whether the user has solved the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_challenge_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_challenge_attempts_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the challenge is recommended */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended challenge */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_recommendations_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the comment */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "is_moderated" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been moderated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_comments_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_ratings_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge affected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "is_reversed" INTEGER /* Whether the action has been reversed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
